title: Maces Are Better
description: This mod adds 4 new enchantments and 1 curse for the mace and also tweaks the old breach and density enchants with some cool new features, also adds a stun when hitting with the mace, MACES ARE BETTER!
body:
Welcome to the **Maces Are Better** Mod, where it tweaks the regular mace enchants and also adds 4 new ones and 1 cursed one that add cool features!

**--Wind Charged--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- Level 1 is 10 blocks up, 2, 3 up to 5 adds 5 more blocks
- You take no fall damage if you miss

**--Smash Attack--**

- Has 5 Levels to it
- Makes blocks go up in the air on impact of a mob
- Each level makes more blocks go up in the air
- Falling blocks deal damage

**--Sonic Punch--**

- Adds a Sonic Boom to every mace hit from any height
- From level 1 to 3 the Sonic Boom deals more damage
- The Sonic Boom deals no damage to the player
- Flings mobs away from you

**--Curse of Featherweight--**

- This curse makes your mace 50% weaker
- Mace does less damage

**--Thunder Strike--**

- Has 3 levels to it
- Adds more thunderbolts with each new level up to three, only 1 thunderbolt for one and so on
- Strikes you too, so be careful!
- Does as much damage as a thunderbolt does

**--Mace Stun Tweak--**

- You can now stun entities for three seconds from any height

**--Breach Tweak--**

- Breach now breaches shields, doing actual damage and stunning the shield too, and damaging the shield a lot too

**--Density Tweak--**

- Makes armor less powerful over more hits over time

**--Mace Smash Tweak--**

- Makes any mob go up in the air by how high your mace smash was, and it deals fall damage to the mob!

Also the mod supports the enchants being on enchanting tables and on villagers.

**Made by MaceMeta**
